This is crucial for business operations and compliance. Next, Atlas should focus on ITIN filing to avoid tax complications. Lastly, checking 83(b) status is essential to ensure proper tax treatment for stock holdings.", "strongest_counter": "Some might argue that franchise tax should be the top priority to avoid penalties, but given the current timeline, setting up the bank account and securing Stripe Atlas perks takes precedence.", "evidence_cited": "ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md, Section 3", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
argument: With the EIN received, Atlas should prioritize setting up a Mercury bank account to enable financial operations and secure Stripe Atlas perks. This is crucial for business operations and compliance. Next, Atlas should focus on ITIN filing to avoid tax complications. Lastly, checking 83(b) status is essential to ensure proper tax treatment for stock holdings.
strongest_counter: Some might argue that franchise tax should be the top priority to avoid penalties, but given the current timeline, setting up the bank account and securing Stripe Atlas perks takes precedence.
